messages.content: 我们已经收到了1家大华的工厂的董事会，它通过了C44ECT，2家的快递正在路上，3家本周没有关于44ECT的反馈) 帮我翻译这段话，英文

"We have received approval from the board of directors of one Dahua factory for C44ECT, and two couriers are on the way. However, we have not received any feedback regarding 44ECT from three other companies this week."
我们已经收到了1家大华的工厂的纸板，它已经通过了C44ECT，2家的快递正在路上，3家本周没有关于44ECT的反馈) 帮我翻译这段话，英文

"We have received the cardboard from one Dahua factory, which has passed C44ECT, and two couriers are on the way. However, we have not received any feedback regarding 44ECT from three other companies this week."

Chorka Textile Limited & SHANTA mistakenly sent incorrect board samples for testing. Revised samples have been sent via FedEx 7721 1222 9180, but the parcel is currently in customs awaiting clearance.什么意思，能不能帮我加句话说，fedex已经帮忙处理，并且一有消息会告诉我们

The message means that Chorka Textile Limited & SHANTA have mistakenly sent incorrect board samples for testing, and they have sent revised samples via FedEx 7721 1222 9180. However, the parcel is currently in customs and awaiting clearance. The sentence that can be added is: FedEx has been contacted to assist with the clearance process, and we will be informed as soon as we receive any updates.
海关扣留的英文
"Customs detention" 或者 "Customs seizure"。
货物被海关扣留的英文
"The goods have been detained by customs" 或者 "The goods are under customs seizure".
快递被海关扣留的英文
"The courier has been detained by customs" 或者 "The courier is under customs seizure".
我们正在等待far dar告诉我们单号的英文
"We are waiting for Far Dar to provide us with the tracking number."
我们已经提交了清关的相关材料，根据fadar的说法，他们已提交报关员审核申报，如有消息再与贵司联系 。怎么翻译成英文

"We have submitted the relevant customs clearance documents, and according to Far Dar, they have submitted the declaration to the customs broker for review. We will contact your company again once we receive any updates."

AYESHA SPINNING still have no submit 32&44ECT 3-PLY board samples for testing OR share the 3rd party test report with us.

这段话对吗

该句子的语法和用词不太对。以下是一种可能的更正版本：

"AYESHA SPINNING has not yet submitted 3-ply board samples for 32&44ECT testing or shared the 3rd-party test report with us."
we have received the board from 1 DAIHWA’s factory and it passed C44ECT, 2 couriers are on the way, 3 have no feedback this week on 44ECT)这句话对吗

该句子的顺序有误，以下是一种更正的版本：

"We have received the board from one Dahua factory and it has passed C44ECT. Two couriers are on the way, but we have not received any feedback regarding 44ECT from three other companies this week."
两家工厂的快递在路上，英文
"The couriers from two factories are on the way."

Chorka Textile Limited & SHANTA mistakenly sent incorrect board samples for testing. Revised samples have been sent via FedEx 7721 1222 9180, but the parcel is currently in customs awaiting clearance. As per FedEx said. We have submitted the relevant customs clearance documents, and according to Far Dar, they have submitted the declaration to the customs broker for review. We will contact your company again once we receive any updates.帮我检查句子，使他通顺

Here is a revised version of the message to make it more clear and fluent:

"Chorka Textile Limited & SHANTA mistakenly sent incorrect board samples for testing. Revised samples have been sent via FedEx (tracking number 7721 1222 9180), but the parcel is currently being held in customs awaiting clearance. We have submitted the relevant customs clearance documents, and according to Far Dar, they have submitted the declaration for review by the customs broker. We will contact your company again as soon as we have any updates."
不是fardar，是fedex

I apologize for the error in my previous response. Here's a corrected version of the message:

"Chorka Textile Limited & SHANTA mistakenly sent incorrect board samples for testing. Revised samples have been sent via FedEx (tracking number 7721 1222 9180), but the parcel is currently being held in customs awaiting clearance. According to FedEx, we have submitted the relevant customs clearance documents and they are assisting with the customs clearance process. We will contact your company again as soon as we have any updates."

Chorka Textile Limited & SHANTA mistakenly sent incorrect board samples for testing. Revised samples have been sent via FedEx 7721 1222 9180, but the parcel is being held in customs awaiting clearance. We have submitted the relevant customs clearance documents. As per the FedEx said, they are assisting with the customs clearance process and will contact us again as soon as they have any updates.有点啰嗦，帮我写简短一代女

"Due to an error, Chorka Textile Limited & SHANTA sent incorrect board samples for testing. We have submitted the relevant customs clearance documents and sent revised samples via FedEx (tracking number 7721 1222 9180). The parcel is currently being held in customs, but FedEx is assisting with clearance and will update us as soon as possible."

Chorka Textile Limited & SHANTA mistakenly sent incorrect board samples for testing. Revised samples have been sent via FedEx 7721 1222 9180, but the parcel is being held in customs awaiting clearance. We have submitted the relevant customs clearance documents. As per the FedEx said, they are assisting with the customs clearance process and will contact us again as soon as they have any updates.有点啰嗦，帮我写简短一点

"Chorka Textile Limited & SHANTA sent incorrect board samples for testing, but we've sent revised samples via FedEx (7721 1222 9180). The parcel is awaiting clearance in customs, and FedEx is helping with the clearance process and will keep us updated."
根据联邦的说法，怎么翻译
"According to the Federal authority" 或者 "As stated by the Federal agency"。
as per 呢

"As per" 的意思与 "according to" 相似，表示 "根据...的话" 或者 "根据...的说法"。这两个短语可以互换使用，表示同样的意思。例如："As per the contract, the payment is due in two weeks." 可以翻译为 "根据合同，支付期限为两周。" 或者 "According to the contract, the payment is due in two weeks."
as per fedex ，ok吗
是的，"as per FedEx" 意思是 "根据FedEx的话" 或者 "根据FedEx的说法"，是一个常用的表达方式。

---GTIG has submitted all PO#4500549102, PO#4500549103, PO# 4500549104 carton details and required compliance photos for our approval, and we have all approved it. (*PO# 4500549104 can summited the photo of Top view, but they really have not enough garments to fill the carton and don’t have the same style, so they can’t submitted the photo of Top view of the full unit quantity) 什么意思

该句的意思是：

"GTIG已经提交了我们批准的所有PO# 4500549102、PO# 4500549103和PO# 4500549104的纸箱细节和要求的合规照片（*PO# 4500549104可以提交顶视图的照片，但他们实际上没有足够的服装装满这个纸箱，并且没有相同的款式，所以他们无法提交完整装箱数量的顶视图的照片）。"

简单来说，GTIG已提交有关三个采购订单的箱子和照片细节，其中一个采购订单无法提供完整装箱数量的照片。 经过我们审批，所有内容均已得到批准。
CAITE already has submitted all selected POs’ carton details and required compliance photos for our approval, and we have done this work. 什么意思

该句的意思是：

"CAITE已经提交了我们批准的所有选定采购订单的纸箱细节和要求的合规照片，并且我们已经完成了审批工作。"

简单来说，CAITE已提交有关选定的采购订单的箱子和照片细节，我们已经完成了审批工作。
